name: Combating AI-Generated Content & Misinformation
description: Users are increasingly frustrated by the proliferation of AI-generated content, fake 'guru' posts, and bot accounts on social media platforms, making it difficult to find authentic human expertise and trustworthy information.
pain_points: Difficulty finding authentic human expertise online
Frustration with fake 'guru' posts and misleading flexing
tech_stack: Slack/Discord (Private community channels for event attendees)
